features: BEST CHOICE - This is a Elite Range branded set. It comes beautifully presented in a stylish, durable, portable and zipped PU leather case. The set can be used by beginners or professionals at home or for camping, hiking, travelling, DIY, emergency repairs, embroidery and more. All the essentials are neatly packed and secured, ready to go and can make the perfect gift.

COMPLETE SEWING KIT - Includes 36 x spools of high quality polyester thread, 30 x stainless-steel needles, 40 x pearl-headed sewing pins, 1 x tailor scissors, 2 x metal thimble (not plastic), 1 x soft tape measure (not rigid), 20 x resin shirt buttons, 1 x seam ripper, 5 x snap buttons, 1 x tailors chalk, 1 x metal threader tweezers, 1 x seam Gauge, 10 x safety pins, 1 x needle threader, 1 x magnifying glass, 5 x wonder clips and 1 x pin cushion.

HIGHLY PORTABLE - The case measures 26 x 20 x 4 cm and can be used to replace your sewing box but only weighs 500 grams. The case provides secure elastic straps to lock each item to keep everything organised at all times. Take it with you everywhere!! The compact size can fit into your handbag, suitcase, backpack, office desk drawer, car, gym locker etc. You will always be prepared for any hand sewing emergencies.

MULTI FUNCTIONAL - There is no need for a sewing box or basket; we have selected all the essential materials. With over 100 pieces to choose from, it provides easy access for those quick, on-the-go repairs. It is great for replacing missing buttons, fixing ripped seams, a quick hem touch-up or adding to your embroidery collection or complimenting your sewing machine. The kit can be used for home, DIY, hobby, beginners, emergency, adult and children, camping, hiking etc.

PEACE Of MIND – We are a UK based company and we want our customers to have complete peace of mind; customer satisfaction is our top priority. Elite Range have worked hard to select the best range to fit in this portable XL case as well as provide great value, if you are not satisfied we will provide a replacement or immediate refund as required.
description: Close at hand, all your sewing essentials in one neatly packaged branded bag Life can be wild, buttons may snap, hems can get worn and seams may undo unexpectedly. Don’t let such issues put a dampener on your day, keep the Elite Range Sewing kit close at bay. The Elite Range Sewing Kit is just the tool you need. Our portable compact kit is packed with all the high-quality sewing necessities you will need. The Package Includes: 36 x Multi-Coloured Polyester Threads (100m with plastic cylinder) 30 x Stainless-Steel Assorted Needles in an easy dispenser case (30 in 1) 40 x Coloured Pearl-Headed Sewing Pins 10 x Safety Pins 20 x Resin shirt buttons 5 x Snap Buttons 5 x Wonder Clips (random colours) 1 x Soft Tape Measure 1 x Seam Ripper 1 x White Tailor Chalk 1 x Seam Gauge 1 x Threader Tweezers 2 x Durable metal sewing thimble 1 x Elite Range Branded Stainless Steel Tailor Scissors 1 x Needle Threader 1 x Magnifying glass 1 x Pin Cushion All this comes in an open-flat, designer, Elite Range Branded PU Leather Case so that all the sewing accessories are visible. Elite Range aim to provide high-quality products. We have worked hard to ensure that you will be happy with this product. Customer satisfaction is our top priority and that is why we offer: ★ Complete peace of mind when purchasing our product ★ We are a UK supplier and will provide you with local support, should the need arise. ★ if you are not satisfied we will provide a replacement or immediate refund as required.
